tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: Most parameters are within normal limits. Mildly elevated potassium and chloride, with slightly decreased total CO₂, may suggest a tendency toward mild metabolic acidosis or early renal tubular dysfunction. Renal function (urea, creatinine) is normal. Recommend clinical correlation and, if indicated, repeat electrolytes and assess acid-base status.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
